subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast spent thy youth in the love of God, who hast grown to maturity in His obedience, and reached old age in steadfastness to His Cause! Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من شب فی محبه الله و شاب فی طاعته و هرم فی الاستقامه علی امره یا طوبی لک و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
